data.acceptance:
1. Initial "Mounted repositories" display in Step 1 works as currently implemented
2. When user initiates a new directory scan to add more repositories:
   - Results filter to show only unmounted repositories (mounted ones are excluded)
   - Message displays "Found N unmounted repositories" (not generic "Found repositories")
   - Selection list contains only unmounted repositories
3. Previously-mounted repositories do not appear in any subsequent discovery scans
4. **Validation**: Manually mount 2-3 repositories, trigger a new scan, verify those mounted repos do not appear in the results list or selection interface
